summary: Iteration 60 — Verified v2.10.84 remote-maintenance (TeamViewer-style) feature end-to-end + the launcher-update-pill stuck-on-success P0 BroadcastReceiver fix. (A) 23/23 pytest tests pass (11 new test_support_session.py + 12 v2.10.81 build_id regression). (B) Full Playwright E2E on /admin/maintenance: pairing screen renders, numeric-only + 6-char truncation works, bad code surfaces 'code_not_found_or_expired' banner, valid code transitions to session screen, all 14 required data-testids present, real WebSocket input round-trip verified (D-pad UP → host receives JSON {type:'input',action:'key',key:'DPAD_UP'}, same for DPAD_CENTER/BACK), end-session button closes WS and returns to pairing with cleared input. (C) Android static review of all 5 files green — manifest activity declaration matches spec exactly, supportIcon ImageView sits RIGHT BEFORE wifiIcon in activity_main.xml line 322 vs 336, ic_support_headset.xml exists, BroadcastReceiver in MainActivity.kt promotes pending_install_build_id_<pkg> → installed_build_id_<pkg> on ACTION_PACKAGE_ADDED/REPLACED with NO version-name check (broadcast itself is authoritative), registered in onCreate via registerPackageInstallReceiver() and unregistered in onDestroy.

backend_test_results.test_support_session.py: 11/11 PASS (HTTP register/connect/cancel/sessions + WebSocket pairing + frame relay + input forwarding + duplicate-controller 409 + bad-code 404)

android_static_review.manifest_activity_declaration: PASS — AndroidManifest.xml:141-145 declares .support.SupportSessionActivity with exported=false, configChanges=orientation|keyboardHidden|screenSize|locale|fontScale|uiMode, theme=Theme.OnNowLauncher.NoActionBar, screenOrientation=landscape — matches spec exactly.
android_static_review.layout_supportIcon_before_wifiIcon: PASS — activity_main.xml:322 supportIcon ImageView, then activity_main.xml:336 wifiIcon ImageView. Source=@drawable/ic_support_headset.
android_static_review.broadcast_receiver_promotion_logic: PASS — MainActivity.kt:2301-2349 registerPackageInstallReceiver() filters ACTION_PACKAGE_ADDED + ACTION_PACKAGE_REPLACED with addDataScheme("package"), reads pending_install_build_id_<pkg>, writes installed_build_id_<pkg>, removes pending key, calls dockAdapter.notifyDataSetChanged(). NO version-name match check — the broadcast itself is the authoritative signal as designed. Also handles RECEIVER_NOT_EXPORTED for API 33+.
android_static_review.receiver_lifecycle: PASS — registered in onCreate (MainActivity.kt:135), unregistered in onDestroy (lines 207-212) inside a try/catch with field nulled afterwards.
android_static_review.note: Code review verifies all 4 new Kotlin files are syntactically clean by inspection; full kotlinc compile happens on the user's GitHub Actions pipeline as noted in the request.

critical_code_review_comments: support_session.py architecture is sound: in-memory dict + asyncio.Lock is fine for single-process, MAX_SESSIONS=64 hard cap prevents memory blow-up, 8-attempt retry on code collision degrades gracefully to 503 code_space_exhausted (theoretically possible at >900k active codes — irrelevant in practice).

Host hello payload is captured into sess.host_hello and replayed to the controller on connect, so the operator sees device geometry even if the host sent hello before the controller paired. Verified in playwright run.
Controller→host input is JSON-text-only forwarded; binary frames are not bidirectional. Correct asymmetry.
Backpressure handling: if controller send_bytes raises, sess.controller_ws is cleared so the host stops trying to relay — prevents tight error loops.
BroadcastReceiver is the right architectural fix for the stale-PackageManager onResume bug: it fires AFTER the install commit so no versionName/build_id race is possible. Sound P0 RCA.
Minor observation (not blocking): support_session.py imports 'json' inside three hot paths (inside the ws receive loops) instead of at module top — works but is a style nit.

Minor observation (not blocking): require_admin is currently a no-op per the test file's docstring ('Admin auth is currently disabled launcher-wide… until it's re-enabled'). When auth is re-enabled, the two tests test_controller_connect_returns_404_without_auth_when_admin_gate_open and test_sessions_list_responds_under_open_admin_gate must be updated to expect 401/403.
test_credentials: Admin token: onnow-launcher-admin-dev (currently a no-op gate — see code review comment).
seed_data_creation: Minted ephemeral pairing codes via /api/support/host/register during tests; sessions auto-reap after 300s.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Maintenance page lives at http://localhost:8002/admin/maintenance (NOT on the React preview ingress at port 3000). To exercise the full WS flow open a Python websockets client to the host endpoint in parallel with Playwright as in iter60_combined.xml; controller-side input arrives at the host as JSON text frames identical to what the controller sends. Admin token gate is currently open — bad/missing token still returns meaningful 404s for invalid codes per test_controller_connect_returns_404_without_auth_when_admin_gate_open.
